info.name: Project Management System - API Gateway
info.description:
API collection for the Project Management System microservices accessed through the API Gateway (port 8762).

**Base URL:** `http://localhost:8762`

**Auth Flow:**
1. Call `Auth / Sign In` to get a JWT token.
2. The test script auto-saves the token to the `bearerToken` collection variable.
3. All secured requests automatically use `Bearer {{bearerToken}}`.

item.name: Auth Service
item.description: Authentication endpoints routed to AUTH-SERVICE via /api/v1/auth/**

request.description:
Register a new user. Public endpoint â€” no token required.

**Roles:** Public

On success, a Kafka message is published to `user-details-creation` for user-service to create a user profile.

exec: console.log('Token saved to bearerToken collection variable.');

request.description:
Authenticate a user and receive a JWT token. Public endpoint â€” no token required.

**Roles:** Public

The test script automatically saves the returned JWT to `bearerToken` so subsequent requests are authenticated.

**Response `data` field:** JWT token string (valid for 1 hour).

Retrieve an auth user record by username.

**Roles:** ADMIN only

Delete an auth user by their UUID.

**Roles:** ADMIN only

On success, a Kafka message is published to `user-details-deletion` so user-service removes the associated profile.

item.name: User Service
item.description: User profile endpoints routed to USER-SERVICE via /api/v1/users/**

query.description: Sort direction: asc or desc (default: asc)

request.description:
Retrieve a paginated list of all user profiles.

**Roles:** ADMIN only

**Response `data` field:** Page of `UserDto` objects:
- `id` (UUID)
- `firstName` (String)
- `lastName` (String)
- `email` (String)
- `authUserId` (UUID)

item.name: Project Service
item.description: Project management endpoints routed to PROJECT-SERVICE via /api/v1/projects/**

body.raw:
{
  "title": "New Web Portal",
  "description": "A customer-facing web portal for self-service account management.",
  "projectStatusType": "PLANNING",
  "startDate": "2026-04-01T09:00:00",
  "endDate": "2026-09-30T18:00:00",
  "userId": "b0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002"
}

request.description:
Create a new project.

**Roles:** ADMIN or USER

**Request body fields:**
- `title` (String, required)
- `description` (String)
- `projectStatusType` (Enum): `PLANNING` | `IN_PROGRESS` | `COMPLETED` | `ON_HOLD` | `CANCELLED`
- `startDate` (LocalDateTime, ISO-8601)
- `endDate` (LocalDateTime, ISO-8601)
- `userId` (UUID) â€” ID of the owning user from user-service

query.description: Sort direction: asc or desc (default: asc)

request.description:
Retrieve a paginated list of all projects.

**Roles:** ADMIN only

**Response `data` field:** Page of `ProjectDto` objects:
- `id` (UUID)
- `title` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `projectStatusType` (Enum)
- `startDate` (LocalDateTime)
- `endDate` (LocalDateTime)
- `userId` (UUID)

Retrieve a single project by its UUID.

**Roles:** ADMIN or USER

**Seed project IDs:**
- `c0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001` â€” E-Commerce Platform Redesign (IN_PROGRESS)
- `c0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002` â€” Mobile Banking Application (PLANNING)
- `c0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003` â€” HR Management System v2 (COMPLETED)
- `c0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000004` â€” Data Analytics Dashboard (ON_HOLD)
- `c0000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000005` â€” Legacy CRM Migration (CANCELLED)

Generate an AI-powered description for the given project using ChatGPT.

**Roles:** ADMIN or USER

Calls AI-SERVICE internally via Feign client (`/api/v1/chat-gpt/ask`).

**Circuit Breaker:** Resilience4j â€” 50% failure threshold over 20 calls; 30s wait before retry.

**Retry:** 2 attempts with exponential backoff.

item.name: Task Service
item.description: Task management endpoints routed to TASK-SERVICE via /api/v1/task/**

query.description: Sort direction: asc or desc (default: asc)

request.description:
Retrieve a paginated list of all tasks.

**Roles:** ROLE_ADMIN only

**Response `data` field:** Page of `TaskDto` objects:
- `id` (String)
- `title` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `taskStatusType` (Enum): `TODO` | `IN_PROGRESS` | `DONE` | `ON_HOLD` | `CANCELLED`
- `taskPriorityType` (Enum): `LOW` | `MEDIUM` | `HIGH` | `CRITICAL` | `BLOCKER`
- `active` (boolean)
- `projectId` (String)
- `userId` (String)
